summary: Frontend testing for new ERP modules (AR, AP, Approval Center, Financial Reports) complete. All 4 pages load correctly with data. Modals work for view/payment. Minor issue with AP detail modal close. Financial Reports shows data but Trial Balance shows 'Not Balanced' state on frontend.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepts clicks, making it difficult to close modal after opening. Had to use Escape key.

integration_issues.issue: Trial Balance shows 'Not Balanced' with Rp 0 debit/credit, but backend test iteration_28 confirmed Trial Balance is balanced at Rp 150M. Data may not be loading correctly.
Neraca shows 'NOT BALANCED' - Total Aktiva Rp 9,189,405 does not equal Kewajiban + Ekuitas (Rp 0). Backend has this data but frontend display shows imbalance.

issues: Dark theme looks professional with good contrast

AR_PAGE.summary_cards: PASS - 4 summary cards displayed (Total Piutang, Jatuh Tempo, Jatuh Tempo 7 Hari, Total Outstanding)
AR_PAGE.aging_report: PASS - Aging buckets displayed (Current: 4 items Rp 15,000,000)
AR_PAGE.view_detail_modal: PASS - Clicking eye icon opens ARDetailModal with payment history
AR_PAGE.payment_modal: PASS - Clicking dollar icon opens ARPaymentModal with form
AR_PAGE.data_display: PASS - AR numbers, dates, customers, amounts displayed correctly

AP_PAGE.summary_cards: PASS - 4 summary cards displayed (Total Hutang: 4, Outstanding: Rp 26,500,000)
AP_PAGE.aging_report: PASS - Aging buckets displayed (Current: 4 items Rp 26,500,000)
AP_PAGE.view_detail_modal: PASS - APDetailModal opens showing supplier, dates, payment history
AP_PAGE.payment_modal: PASS - APPaymentModal opens with amount, payment method fields

APPROVAL_CENTER.summary_cards: PASS - 4 summary cards (Menunggu Saya, Total Pending, Approved, Rejected)
APPROVAL_CENTER.tabs_navigation: PASS - 3 tabs found (Pending Approval, Semua Request, Approval Rules)
APPROVAL_CENTER.rules_display: PASS - 7 approval rules displayed with level badges

FINANCIAL_REPORTS.report_type_selection: PASS - 3 report types clickable (Trial Balance, Neraca, Laba Rugi)
FINANCIAL_REPORTS.generate_button: PASS - Generate button works for all report types
FINANCIAL_REPORTS.income_statement: PASS - Shows PENDAPATAN (Revenue), BEBAN (Expenses), RUGI BERSIH sections

SIDEBAR_NAVIGATION.ar_menu: PASS - Piutang (AR) accessible under Akuntansi menu
SIDEBAR_NAVIGATION.ap_menu: PASS - Hutang (AP) accessible under Akuntansi menu
SIDEBAR_NAVIGATION.approval_center: PASS - Approval Center has dedicated menu item with AI badge
SIDEBAR_NAVIGATION.financial_reports: PASS - Lap. Keuangan accessible under Akuntansi menu

action_items: MEDIUM: Fix AP Detail Modal overlay click interception - use stopPropagation or fix z-index
HIGH: Debug Trial Balance data loading - backend returns Rp 150M balanced, frontend shows Rp 0
MEDIUM: Debug Balance Sheet calculation - Kewajiban/Ekuitas not loading properly
critical_code_review_comments: All 4 pages implemented with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Indonesian language (Bahasa) consistently used throughout UI
Summary cards, aging reports, and filters properly integrated with backend APIs
Modal components (ARDetailModal, ARPaymentModal, APDetailModal, APPaymentModal) all functional
Financial Reports page has 3 report types with date filtering capability

success_rate.frontend: 85% - All pages load and function, minor modal and financial report data issues

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data from iteration_28 (4 AR, 4 AP records)
context_for_next_testing_agent: AR/AP/Approval/Financial Reports pages all working. Modal interactions verified. Financial Reports Trial Balance and Balance Sheet show imbalanced status on frontend despite backend showing balanced data - may need to debug API response handling. Login requires clicking 'OCB GROUP' business card first, then entering credentials. Sidebar shows Approval Center with AI badge, AR/AP under Akuntansi menu.
